DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Continued To Mar-29-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO 49ERS, LTD.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' VERIFIED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCE: Benjamin J. Riley, Esq. of Chapman, Popik & White, LLP 352-3000 for pltfs & opposing parties; Sonya D. Winner, Esq. of Covington & Burling 591-7072 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and continued to 03/29/06, at which time the Court will take the matter under submission. No appearances necessary. Parties to submit proposed forms of orders on 03/29/06. By stipulation of counsel, pltfs' counsel to file a first amended complaint on or before 03/24/06. Counsel to present stip & order at the ex parte hour. Counsel to file a statement with the Court no later than 03/29/06 something to the effect that the argument heard today would have applied to the first amended complaint as if it had been on file at the time of argument. Parties to expressly waive any irregularities. Matter deemed submitted on 03/29/06. (301/JLW/CK) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
